import React from 'react'; const Contact = () => { const contactMethods = [ { icon: "📍", title: "Global Headquarters", detail: "Belapur, Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India", desc: "Our primary hub for technical sourcing and strategy." }, { icon: "📞", title: "Direct Line", detail: "+91 98XXX XXXXX", desc: "Available Mon-Fri, 9am - 6pm for corporate inquiries." }, { icon: "📧", title: "Email Support", detail: "contact@hudsonsolutions.com", desc: "Send us your manpower requirements anytime." } ]; return (

Your Team.

{/* 2. MAIN CONTENT SECTION */}
{/* LEFT: CONTACT METHODS */}

Our Offices

{contactMethods.map((method, i) => (
{method.icon}

{method.title}

{method.detail}

{method.desc}

))}
{/* MAP PLACEHOLDER / SOCIALS */}

Follow Our Network

Stay updated with the latest talent trends and industry shifts.

{['LinkedIn', 'Twitter', 'Instagram'].map(social => ( ))}

{/* 3. LOCATIONS BANNER */}

Global Footprint

{['Mumbai', 'Varanasi', 'Europe', 'Middle East'].map(city => ( {city} ))}
); }; export default Contact;
